creator: freebsd@beardz.net
text:
Hi,

It seems that files/patch-CPU.xs in my original patch doesn't have dos 
CRLF line terminators as it should. I'm not quite sure how that 
happened, but I've attached an amended port patch which has the correct 
line terminators for files/patch-CPU.xs.

Sorry for any time wasted as a result.

Regards,

Jase Thew.
